meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve no coding experience (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no coding experience. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Project Template: Build SaaS Without Coding
content.seo_description: Overcome no-code limitations with the Antigravity project template. A professional guide for freelancers to ship faster using AI-driven workflows.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template bridges the gap between no-code constraints and professional development. By leveraging AI-assisted scaffolding, you can generate production-ready application structures, integrate complex logic, and deploy scalable SaaS solutions without writing manual boilerplate, significantly reducing your time-to-market while maintaining total codebase control for your clients.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking on your client project, and the limitations of no-code platforms are hitting a wall. You need custom logic that drag-and-drop builders simply cannot touch, but you lack the months required to master full-stack development. This is the friction point where most freelancers stall—stuck between limited templates and the mountain of manual coding.

Enter the Antigravity project template. This is not just another boilerplate; it is an architectural blueprint designed for AI-driven development. By pairing Antigravity’s structural efficiency with the reasoning capabilities of Claude Code, you can bypass the 'blank page' syndrome and ship complex, high-performance applications in a fraction of the time.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the core architecture. This step creates a modular foundation that allows for future-proof scaling.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new SaaS project scaffold using the Antigravity standard architecture with support for Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and Supabase integration.

steps.title: Define Domain Models
steps.description: Map your client's database requirements into the project to ensure type safety from the start.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate database schema definitions for a multi-tenant user authentication and subscription management system based on the Antigravity pattern.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate prisma schema with user, subscription, and project entities'

steps.title: Configure API Middleware
steps.description: Implement robust server-side logic to handle requests securely without writing manual boilerplate.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure secure API middleware using Antigravity best practices to enforce role-based access control for all incoming requests.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement middleware for auth and rate limiting'

steps.title: Generate UI Components
steps.description: Rapidly build the frontend using the template's design tokens for a professional, client-ready look.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a responsive dashboard component library using Tailwind CSS that matches the Antigravity design system specs.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create dashboard UI components with sidebar, header, and data table'

steps.title: Finalize Deployment Pipeline
steps.description: Automate your CI/CD to ensure every push to the repo is production-ready for your client.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Set up a GitHub Actions workflow for the Antigravity project that automates testing and deployment to Vercel.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'configure github actions for auto-deploy to vercel'

pro_tips: Always use the '--dry-run' flag in Claude Code to review AI-generated file changes before committing to your repo.
Maintain a 'system_prompt.txt' in your project root to keep the AI aligned with your specific coding style across long-term projects.
Leverage Antigravity's 'hooks' directory to isolate business logic, making it easier to swap out third-party services later for clients.
Use Claude Code to generate unit tests for every new feature; it ensures client stability and reduces your long-term maintenance overhead.
Keep your project dependencies lean by explicitly instructing the AI to avoid 'bloated' libraries unless absolutely necessary for the feature.
content.next_steps: After deploying your first project, focus on building a library of custom 'Antigravity' components that you can reuse across multiple client projects to scale your freelance business.
content.conversion_block: Stop settling for rigid no-code tools and start building custom, high-value software that commands premium rates. By mastering the Antigravity workflow, you position yourself as a top-tier engineer who delivers speed, quality, and reliability. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
